snippet.title: Major Teaser | Telugu | Adivi Sesh | Sobhita | Saiee Manjrekar | Mahesh Babu | Sashi Tikka
snippet.description:
#Major Telugu Teaser. Major, an Indian film, releasing in Telugu, Hindi and Malayalam is produced by Sony Pictures Films India in association with Mahesh Babu's GMB Entertainment Pvt. Ltd. and A+S Movies. It is directed by acclaimed Telugu director Sashi Kiran Tikka and features Adivi Sesh, Sobhita Dhulipala and Saiee Manjrekar. 

‘The film speaks about the way he lived, not about the way he lost his life.’ 

#MajorTeaser #MajorTheFilm #AdiviSesh #MaheshBabu

Based on the life of real-life Hero Major Sandeep Unnikrishnan, Major, the film, aims to show how this valiant soldier saved the lives of numerous hostages before being martyred by the terrorists who wreaked havoc in the Taj Mahal Palace Mumbai, India on the 26th of November, 2008.

Starring: Adivi Sesh, Saiee Manjrekar, Sobhita Dhulipala, Prakash Raj, Revathi, Murali Sharma
Produced by: Sony Pictures Films India, GMB Entertainment, and A+S Movies
Directed by: Sashi Kiran Tikka
Story and Screenplay: Adivi Sesh 
Script Guidance and Telugu DIalogue: Abburi Ravi 
Cinematography: Vamsi Patchipulusu
Music: Sri Charan Pakala
Editing: Vinay Kumar Sirigineedi &  Kodati Pavan Kalyan
Lyrics: Ramajogayya Sastry (Telugu), Ritesh Rajwada (Hindi)
Production Designer: Avinash Kolla
Action Choreography: Sunil Rodrigues 
Additional Action Choreography: Naba-Subbu
Hindi Dialogue: Akshat Ajay Sharma
Malayalam Dialogue: Yedhu-Abhijith M
Costume Designer : Rekha Boggarapu
Executive Producer: Rajiv Bharadwaj
Direction Team: Vinay Kumar Sirigineedi, Narendra Gautam Varma, Dinesh Jajula, Anurag Mudiganti, Balu Manoj D
DI, VFX and Sound Mix: Annapurna Studios
Technical Head: CV Rao
Colorist: Vishnu Vardhan K
VFX Supervisor: Venkateshwar Allagadda
Sound Mix: Krishnaraj Arumugam
Sound Design: Ethi Raaj
P.R.O. : Vamsi-Shekar(Telugu), Sanchita Trivedi(Hindi), Athira Diljith(Malayalam)
Publicity Designs : Anil-Bhanu
Digital Agency: First Show(Telugu), White Rivers Media(Hindi)

Please join the microsite to share your tribute: https://majorthemovie.sonypicturesindia.com

snippet.title: Maharashtra Lockdown | राज्य सरकार 14 एप्रिलच्या मध्यरात्रीपासून लॉकडाऊन लावण्याच्या तयारीत
snippet.description: राज्यात कोरोनाची वाढती रुग्णसंख्या लक्षात घेता राज्य सरकार 14 एप्रिलच्या मध्यरात्रीपासून लॉकडाऊन लावण्याच्या तयारीत आहे. 14 एप्रिलच्या मध्यरात्रीपासून ते 30 एप्रिलच्या मध्यरात्री पर्यंत लॉकडाऊन करणार असल्याचं कळतंय. जर रुग्णांच्या संख्येत घट झाली नाही तर लॉकडाऊनचा कालावधी आणखी वाढण्याची शक्यता आहे. या लॉकडाऊन दरम्यान फक्त अत्यावश्यक सेवा सुरु राहतील. वेळीच लॉकडाऊन केलं नाही तर एप्रिल महिन्याच्या शेवटपर्यंत रुग्णांचा आकडा 11 लाखांच्या आसपास जाण्याची शक्यता आहे. त्यामुळे राज्य सरकार लॉकडाउन दरम्यान कडक निर्बंध लावण्याच्या तयारीत आहे.

snippet.title: Introducing Pushpa Raj | Allu Arjun | Pushpa | Rashmika | Fahadh Faasil | DSP | Sukumar
snippet.description:
Introducing Pushpa Raj on Mythri Movie Makers. Written and Directed by Sukumar. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y. Ravi Shankar of Mythri Movie Makers in association with Muttamsetty Media, the film stars Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil and Rashmika Mandanna, Dhanunjay, Rao Ramesh & Ajay Ghosh
a
The film's music is composed by Devi Sri Prasad, with cinematography and editing were performed by Miroslaw Kuba Brozek and Karthika Srinivas respectively. The film is scheduled to release on 13 August 2021, in Telugu along with dubbed versions in Malayalam, Tamil, Hindi and Kannada languages.

#Pushpa​ #IntroducingPushpaRaj #AlluArjun​ #PushpaTeaser #PreludeOfPushparaj #Rashmika​ #Faasil #Sukumar​ #DSP #MythriMovieMakers​ 

Directed by Sukumar
Produced by Naveen Yerneni, Y. Ravi Shankar
Starring: Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil, Rashmika Mandanna
Music by Devi Sri Prasad
Cinematography: Miroslaw Kuba Brozek
Edited by Karthika Srinivas
Production Companies: Mythri Movie Makers, Muttamsetty Media
Release Date:13 August 2021

snippet.title: Great for the good | ft. Rahul Dravid | CRED
snippet.description:
Hi, this is Rahul Dravid writing the description for this video.
Sorry, I lost my temper there. I am meditating these days. 

Well, I am just writing this to let you know that CRED truly rewards you every time you pay your credit card bills on time. They are good people. Become a CRED member to discover this for yourself: https://app.cred.club/k63y/thewall​

Also, if an ‘Ajay’ from the red SUV who overtook me at the signal on 8th April 2021 is reading this, meet me there again in a week’s time. I’ll be waiting.

snippet.title: MOVING HOUSES || House tour || What's up with us - Leo&Fam
snippet.description:
Hey everybody,

Sorry that it took this long to upload a video here. 
Honestly, life's been chaotic!!! We are doing great right now and hope you guys are staying safe and well too... You all know we shifted houses recently but we realise you didnt get what the hell and heaven has happened and why we were shifting all of a sudden!? A lot of you wanted a house tour and some of you just wanted to know what's been up at our end. I really hope this video gives all the answers :)

Love,
Leo&Fam!

snippet.description:
AMIT SAINI ROHTAKIYA - Daaru Ki Peti | दारु कि पेटी | New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021 | Full Video | Superhit Haryanvi Songs | Tips Haryanvi 

Tips Haryanvi presents Official video of New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021 #DaaruKiPeti, by #AmitSainiRohtakiya Featuring #ShailSingh. The song is written by #KPKundu & #BintuPabra; Composed by #GRMusic. 

Stay updated with latest videos from Tips Haryanvi, Subscribe on below link. https://bit.ly/TipsHaryanviChannel

Available On:
JioSaavn: https://www.jiosaavn.com/album/daaru-ki-peti/CBamTMk5E-E_
Amazon: https://music.amazon.in/albums/B091M5681N
Resso: https://m.resso.app/ZSJMoWsnP/
Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/in/album/daaru-ki-peti-single/1561347653

Song Credits:-
Staring: Amit Saini Rohtakiya & Shail Singh
Singer: Amit Saini Rohtakiya
Lyrics: K P Kundu & Bintu Pabra
Music: G R Music
DOP: Munish Sharma
Edit/DI: Rom Yo Rider
Director: Jeetu G

Song Lyrics:

Tane Ese Mile Nye Diladaar Darling
Hoge Change Dino Din Kirdaar Darling
Kutya Main Bi Hove Bafadaari Aale Gunn 
Tere Jakhma Ne Sui Taagya Gel Sigya Re
Meri Daru Aali Petiyan Ka Karjya Hisaab 
Teri Yaadyan Main Yo Chora Pura Theka Pigya Re
                    
Meri Fenk Gi Tu Gaani Rani Haar Dekhke
Mera Tvs Chodya Kaali Thaar Dekhte
Kde Maar Khagya Tere Pyaar Main Jakon
Main To Mess Bi Leu Tha Motti Dhaar Dekhke
Tu Soya Kardi Main Rooj Maar Ke 
Eab Sochdi Hogi Saala Fer Jigya Re
Meri Daru Aali Petiyan Ka Karjya Hisaab 
Teri Yaadyan Main Yo Chora Pura Theka Pigya Re
                     
Teri Fhotuyan Pe Delli Chora Haar Taange Se
Gaal Taagya Main Namak Nimbu Bhaar Tange Se
Pabre Kinale Main Meri Margi Padet 
Saade 16 Sun Dekedaar Mange Se
Kp Bintu Gaanya Te Chlave Rotti Pani 
Tere Dokhya Pe Yo Gaana Su Fer Likhya Re
Meri Daru Aali Petiyan Ka Karjya Hisaab 
Teri Yaadyan Main Yo Chora Pura Theka Pigya Re

Do Share your feedback in comments.
Don't Forget to Subscribe Brown Town Music : http://bit.ly/subscribebrowntownmusic​​​


Lyrics:

Jado koi hiqq naal laau sohniye,
Tenu pakka cheta  mera aau sohniye,
Gore gall nu jo la k ditte chawa na tweet,
Koi zulfa hta k galo laau sohniye,
Mera pau ga plekha baar baar,
 
Dassi j koi kare ni tenu mere vangu sohniye pyaar,
 
 
Mere baare ta zaroori ohnu dasse gi,
Man rovega tera te utto hasse gi,
Ohne tenu khaas kade chauna nai,
Vaada tere naal ma v mud auna nai,
Chatt labb jande ajj kall yaar,
 
 
Dassi j koi kare ni , Tenu mere wangu sohniye pyaar 
 
 
Kheda jazbaata naal aam jaiya galla ne,
Khore tenu mere lai bnaya nai c allah ne,
Zind lekhe laayi bhora kitta na lihaaj,
Haye Rakhi na rkaane hun dhillon kolo aas,
Tera sarda asi v la ge saar ,
 
 
Dassi j koi kare ni , tenu mere vangu sohniye pyaar.

snippet.title: தமிழ்ப் புத்தாண்டு அன்று கனி காணுதல் | வாங்க வேண்டிய 2 முக்கிய பொருட்கள் | தமிழ் வருடப் பிறப்பு 2021
snippet.description:
சித்திரை மாதத்தில் பிறந்தவர்களும், குழந்தை பெற்றவர்களும் பார்க்க வேண்டிய பதிவு | Desa Mangayarkarasi
https://youtu.be/XxAB_XVBMZo

மருத்து நீராடி தமிழ்ப் புத்தாண்டை வரவேற்று வழிபடும் முறை | கனி காணுதல் | தமிழ் வருட பிறப்பு
https://youtu.be/0g00MJwEQNw

செல்வம், ஆரோக்கியம், நீண்ட ஆயுள் பெற தமிழ்ப் புத்தாண்டை வரவேற்று வழிபடும் முறை.   மேலும் கனி காணுதல், அறுசுவை உணவு படைத்தல், வழிபடும் நேரம் என பல தகவல்களை திருமதி. தேச மங்கையர்க்கரசி அம்மா அவர்கள் அளித்துள்ளார். 

- ஆத்ம ஞான மையம் 

# சித்திரை கனி காணுதல் 
# தமிழ் வருட பிறப்பு 
# Tamil New Year
# தமிழ்ப் புத்தாண்டு

Watch the Latest promo of the Tamil Serial #Chithi 2 that airs on Sun TV.

Watch your favorite serials Free on Sun NXT, immediately after TV. Offer Valid till 25th Apr 2021
 
Watch Chithi 2 Mon-Sat @10.00 PM on Sun TV. 

Chithi 2, is a whole new story., about yet another ‘Chithi’, our kind-hearted and brave-spirited Saradha. Her portrayal of love, forgiveness, sacrifice, fierceness, and perseverance towards her family, through the thick and thin of life, makes one believe in the power of family. Watch and travel along with Saradha’s offbeat family.

snippet.description:
Here's the promo video of Godson Rudolph Meets Ashwin Kumar  for the latest Tamil album, "Criminal Crush," featuring Cook with Comali fame Ashwin Kumar & Tanya Ravichandran.  Godson has composed the song. 

Sensational Music Director Anirudh Ravichander has sung the  "Criminal Crush" Song. The full song is releasing soon. Watch this space, so you don't miss out!

snippet.title: Kisan Andolan: Narendra Tomar के बयान पर भड़के Tikait, CM Khattar के खिलाफ बनाई तगड़ी योजना...
snippet.description:
Kisan Andolan: Narendra Tomar के बयान पर भड़के Tikait, CM Khattar के खिलाफ बनाई तगड़ी योजना | Punjab Tak

रविवार को खाप पंचायतों के साथ बैठक के बाद संयुक्त किसान मोर्चा ने फैसला किया है कि.. 14 अप्रैल का बाबा साहब भीम राव आंबेडर जयंती पर सोनीपत के बड़ोली में आयोजित कार्यक्रम में सीएम मनोहर लाल खट्टर का विरोध करेंगे.. संयुक्त किसान मोर्चा के साथ खाप नेताओं ने भी सीएम के विरोध का ऐलान किया है.. वहीं किसान नेता राकेश टिकैत ने कृषि मंत्री नरेंद्र सिंह तोमर के बयान पर प्रतिक्रिया देते हुए कहा है कि.. सरकार छेड़खानी करने की कोशिश कर रही है.. किसान आंदोलन कोई शाहीन बाग का आंदोलन नहीं है.. जो ऐसे खत्म हो जाएगा।

#KisanAndolan #NarendraTomar #RakeshTikait #Khattar #NSTOMAR  #KisanEktaMorcha

अब हर वीडियो देखें बिना ब्रेक. अभी डाउनलोड करें TAK App https://bit.ly/379ltxp
------
About the channel:

Punjab Tak is a news channel about Punjab and Punjabis residing in the different parts of the world. It covers news about People, Politics, Sports, Entertainment and International affairs that interest Punjabis.
 

पंजाब तक एक न्यूज चैनल है। ऐसा चैनल जो पंजाब के ही नहीं बल्कि दुनिया भर में फैले पंजाबियों की खबरें आप तक पंहुचाता है। खबर लोगों के बारे में हों या राजनीति की, या खेल की या फिर मनोरंजन की। यहां हम करते हैं दुनिया भर में फैले पंजाबियों से जुड़े मसलों का विशलेषण।    

Follow us at:

FB: https://www.facebook.com/punjabtakofficial/
Twitter: https://twitter.com/PunjabTak

Started By Gaurav Taneja. Gaurav is a International Certified Nutritionist and a Personal Trainer and a National level professional Bodybuilder. He has written many articles/blogs over a period of time which has been appreciated for its content and TRUTH.

Gaurav is a graduate from the prestigious Indian Institute of Technology,Kharagpur. Graduated in 2008, he has been closely involved with Health and Fitness since 2002.

Gaurav is also a Professional Pilot. He is a Captain with one of the major airlines in India.

snippet.title: TVF's Aspirants | Web Series | Episode 1 | UPSC - Optional Me Kya Hai?
snippet.description:
Rate us on IMDb - https://www.imdb.com/title/tt14392248/

As a UPSC Aspirant, choices are always tough when you have to select the subjects. But choices become even tougher when it's your last attempt and you are considering changing the optional subject. Abhilash is facing a dilemma. What will he do? Make the touch choice or just go with the flow? What do his friends have to say about it?

One of the biggest and most ambitious dreams - to become an IAS officer! Here’s to the ones who are working hard to crack it. In this journey of rediscovering yourself and giving your best, make Unacademy your companion. Learn and be mentored by Top Educators and move closer to cracking your goal. Take a Free Live Class today!

Enroll Now - https://unacademy.onelink.me/M2BR/e3d9cc8c

This examination season, we bring you the story of three friends who reunite to tell us all about UPSC Pre... Mains... Aur Life. 

Unacademy & The Viral Fever present ASPIRANTS - A TVF Original Series. 

Credits:
Created by: Arunabh Kumar & Shreyansh Pandey
Directed by: Apoorv Singh Karki

snippet.title: In conversation with AR Rahman | Yashraj Mukhate | 99 Songs | @A. R. Rahman
snippet.description:
Have you ever lived a dream? I recently did. I met my idol, @arrhaman sir and it wasn’t any less than living a dream, and got an opportunity to chat with him. We have that one thing in common - our belief in music.

#99Songs is a story that makes you believe in the magic of music, the power it brings to you, the way it can complete you. #99Songs is my story, it’s a story for every music lover out there, who has a dream... a dream to change the world. Thank you sir for this story. Can’t wait to experience the magic of this musical romance in cinemas this Friday.

Do check out the trailer : https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2BLkIi9twB8

snippet.title: Nayantara - Full Episode | 10 April 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Nayantara" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Nayantara: After 10 years of marriage, Adidev (Gourab Mondal) and Averi (Payal De) are about to experience parenthood with the birth of their first child. The doctor warns Avery that she might face life threatening complications if she decides to go ahead with the child birth. Averi does not tell Adidev about this because she wants to give him the happiness of fatherhood and be a mother herself. On the other hand, Avery means the world to Adidev, so he will definitely chose her life over the child. Avery gives birth to Tara (Hiya Mukherjee). Avery dies within a few minutes of Tara’s birth. The doctor informs Adidev that he had warned Avery but she did not listen. Adidev, who was already devastated by his wife's death, comes to know that the Income Tax Department had raided his office. Adidev starts to believe that Tara is the source of the misfortune in his life and hatred grows in his heart for Tara. On the other hand, Adidev's second wife Madhuja (Swarnakamal) loves Tara more than her own daughter Preeti. But Adideb can’t tolerate that either. Tara's only wish, will she ever get his father's affection?

snippet.title: तासा दीड तासात "गुढीपाडवा थाळी" / ना अळूचा रोल ना वाटण, बनवा ही स्पेशल थाळी पट्कन। Gudhipada Thali
snippet.description:
कमी वेळात होणारी "गुढीपाडवा थाळी" / ना अळूचा रोल ना वाटण, बनवा ही स्पेशल थाळी पट्कन। Gudhipada Thali

गुढीपाडवा खास थाळी -
आमरस, कमी तेलकट पुरी, झटपट अळू वडी, चमचमीत आलू मटार भाजी

इथे सांगितलेला मेनू आपन कोणतेही वाटण न बनवता, अळू वडी रोल न करता, अगदी तासा दीड तासात तयार होईल अशी गुढी पाडवा स्पेशल थाळी.
जर आंबे उपलब्ध नसतील तर तुम्ही श्रीखंड पण बनवू शकता..

श्रीखंड रेसीपी - https://youtu.be/UTrKvrf1NMA

snippet.title: Galat (Official Video) Asees Kaur | Rubina Dilaik, Paras Chhabra | Vikas | Raj Fatehpur
snippet.description:
VYRL Originals presents Galat by Asees Kaur and starring Bigg Boss fans two favourite contestants - Big Boss 14 Winner Rubina Dilaik and Paras Chhabra. Keeping melancholy as the central theme of this song, the hit trio of – Vikas as composer, Sunny Vik as the producer and the lyricist Raj Fatehpur have worked their magic yet again on Galat. Directed By TRU Makers the story narrates a tale of love and betrayal, with stunning performances by Rubina and Paras as the protagonist who will compel you to see the story unfold till the end. 

Which scene or lyrics impressed you the most? Tell us in the comments below…

#VYRLOriginals #RubinaDilaik #ParasChhabra

🎶 Listen 🎧  🎶 Now On 📲 🤳

♫ JioSaavn - https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/galat/RF4DWgxfVF8
♫ Gaana - https://gaana.com/song/galat
♫ Wynk - https://wynk.in/u/HmteEng78
♫ Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/album/7v02B7tDzQHcPpgXHsZeEm
♫ Resso - https://m.resso.app/ZSJ6KvryY/
♫ Amazon Prime Music - https://music.amazon.in/albums/B091HTH6ZZ
♫ Apple Music - https://music.apple.com/in/album/galat/1561142222?i=1561142475
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

🎤 Singer - Asees Kaur
➟ Music Producer - Sunnyvik

➟ Hair - Sharda Jhadhav 
➟ Make up - Jignesh Shah
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
📝 Lyrics

Warka Hauli Hauli Karke Palat Ho Reha Ae
Mainu Lagdey Meri Zindagi vich
Kuch Galat Ho Reha Ae

Oh Kise Hor Da Hona Chahunde Ne
Mainu Jhootha Pauna Chahunde Ne
Main Samjh Geyi han
Zindagi Cho Mainu Dhakka dena Chahunde Ne

Mere Nal Nal Eh Khali Khali
Falak Roo Reha Ae
Mainu Lagdey Meri Zindagi vich
Kuch Galat Ho Reha Ae

Main Waqt Kina Barbad Kara
Jad Bewafa Nu Yaad Kara
Main Paagal Ajj vi Har Kam Nu
Tera Naam Len Baad Kara

RAJ RAJ Main Yaad 
Teri Vich Khud Nu Kho Rahi
Main Ajj v Dardi Loka Ton
Barish Vich Roo Rahi

Dhokha Mere Nal Haye
Ab Talak Ho Reha Ae
Mainu Lagdey Meri Zindagi vich
Kuch Galat Ho Reha Ae

Kabhi Kabhi Tere Dard Mein Haye Sharaab Bhi Piti Hoon
Maine Suna Main Tere Chehre Se Dikhayi Deti Hoon

Mera Jeena Mera Jeena Zeher Ho Gya Hai
Mera Dil Mujhse Rooth Gya Haye Gair Ho Gya Hai

Pal Pal Mereya Saaha Da
Haye Katal Ho Reha Ae
Mainu Lagdey Meri Zindagi vich
Kuch Galat Ho Reha Ae

snippet.title: Echipaadd Full Video | Noel Sean Feat Dethadi Harika | Vinay Shanmukh | Megisto | Infinitum Media
snippet.description:
#Echipaadd 

All My Songs Are An Inspiration From Life & People Around, This Song Will Hold A Special Place In My Heart For  All The Experiences I Have Been Through.
I Believe The More Darker It Gets The More Brighter We Shine!
Echipaadd Is An Answer To Many Questions 

Love 
GangStar!

This Song Goes Out To All My Gangstars Who Loved & Supported Me All My Journey Till Date & Ofcourse To Harikas Fans Too!!!

Much Love
Noel Sean!

#NoelSean #AlekhyaHarika #Infinitum #VinayShanmukh #Noel #TeluguRap #Gangstar #DethadiHarika 

Echipaadd Credits:
Concept, Composition, Lyrics & Rap -  Noel Sean Alekhya Harika
Director, DOP, Edit & DI - Vinay Shanmukh
Music - Megisto
Styling - Navya Marouthu
Studio / Mix - Vinay Kumar
Recording Engineer  - Rakesh 
Produced By Noel Sean & Infinitum
Asst DOP - VFX  : Suneel reddy
Co.Director.   : Manu alluri 
Hair & Makeup : Thimmappa 


Echipaadd Lyrics - 

Gangstarrr..!! Lets Go...

Just One Life...
Make It The Best 
Evademanna Kick It To  Dust
khastam Nashtam Competition 
Evadikaina Common Eee
khastapadithe Success Kuda Avotundi Nee Mistress Leee
nothing Is Permanent Except Your Confidence
Bongukuda Panikiravu Buildup & Showy Things
Tene Chuttu Thigeyle 
Money Chuttu Manushule Paina Paina Premale
Raktam Thage Snehale 
Chal Chal Chal Chal Mamaa Kaiku Kartha Thu Drama 
Chill Chill Chill Chill Mama Lokam Antha Full Drama 
KICK IT HARD....
KICK IT HARD....
Sing With Me
Echipaadd Yo!!!
Echipaad Yoo!!!

Dethadi Groove...
Move It Girl
I Like That...
Bring It On...
Let's Go............!

Life Antha Ankele
Ankella Sankelle 
Paddavo Thiruddi Doolathrichi Potundi...
Yavadi Sothu Kaadu Eedi ... Mayajalam Anathidi 
Chedavo Thirudi 
Manasuni Mingivestundi
Nuvvento Nuvve Telusuko..
Anni Adupulo Pettuko
Pottaku Thindi 
Kaantiki Nidra 
Thalapai Needa
Preminche Manushuloo Neetho Valle Untaroo
Migitha Antha Bogusuu...
Nothing Really Matters Dude

SING WITH ME.....

Echipaadd Yo!!!
Echipaadd Yo!!!


Dethadi Groove
Move It Gal
I Like That
Bring It On...

Let's Go......!


Money, Love Sex & Game PDA Is So Lame......!
Nijamina Prema Neekunte Ee Show Off 
Prema Avasaram Lee...
Premanna Maate Sachipoyindi...
Athiga Vadesi Ruchi Poyindi...
Porilu Kuda Thakkuvem Leru..
Vaalu Vadithe Teere Veeru
Chakkarloo Kottiste Chakkarle Vastayi
Rendu Chethulathone Kada Chappatlu Vastayi..
Full ga Vadesi Friend Zone Chesi 
Manchodu Manchodu Ani Pichoodini Chesi
Solo Kings Nee Driver lani Chesi
Oorantha Thippi Tisi Needi Pippi 
Chese Ninnu Fruitu 
Chetikiche Flute...
Orchestra Ke clChupinche Routeuu..
Saddest Day Whattta Gloomy Night...
Vayinchu Chinna Pi Pi Pi 
Vayinchuuu Chinna Pipipipi

Chuck It Boy!
Echipaadd Yo!!!!!
Echipaadd Yo!!!!!
Dethadi Groove
Swing It Gal
Lets Go......


Gangstar...Noel Sean...!
Dethadi..Harika Yoo...!
Echipaadd...................!

About Super Dancer 4 : 
---------------------------------------------------
Now in its fourth season, Super Dancer is a popular children's dance reality show. Spearheaded by Bollywood actress Shilpa Shetty, renowned choreographer Geeta Kapoor and Bollywood Director Anurag Basu, the show looks for 'Dance ka Kal'. After nationwide auditions, the judges select 12 children who are extraordinary dancers, aged between 4 to 13. These 12 dancers are paired with popular and able choreographers, the Super Gurus. Along with their Gurus, the kids compete to become Super Dancer - Dance Ka Kal.

snippet.title: Power of Hyaluronic Acid Serum | #ShehnaazGill | L'Oreal Paris
snippet.description:
#MagicOfHAserum #HyaluronicAcid #HyaluronicSerum  

The L’Oréal Revitalift 1.5% hyaluronic acid face serum penetrates deeper and gives intense hydration and radiance. It gives instant visible results and the skin gets better day after day. Day after day skin looks hydrated, smooth, radiant, and youthful. Hyaluronic acid is a must have ingredient in the skincare routine.This lightweight serum formula absorbs quickly into the skin and feels non-sticky and non-oily. It has no leftover sticky residue, leaving you with a re-plumped and soft finish on the skin. This serum is fragrance free, paraben free and has no alcohol or synthetic dyes. It is suitable for all skin types and can be used daily.

#LorealHyaluronicAcidSerum #LorealParis #ad

snippet.title: Get Skilled and Earn Well | Awareness | Dreamz Unlimited
snippet.description:
Pinnacle Skills is a skill development training institute established in 2012. It is an approved training partner of the National Skill Development Corporation (NSDC) under the aegis of Ministry of Skill Development & Entrepreneurship, Govt. of India.  It has training centres at many districts of Nagaland.
Pinnacle Skills offers short term courses like Hospitality, Information Technology, Beauty & wellness, Healthcare, Construction (electrician, mason, carpentry etc.), Apparel (Tailoring), Agriculture and many other courses. Many of these courses are job placement linked. It also offers entrepreneurship development programs (EDP). 
Pinnacle Skills has separate hostel facilities for boys and girls. Many of the courses are sponsored by the government. Students from any part of the state can come and learn for free.
Know more about Pinnacle Skills at our official website http://www.pinnacleskills.in 

For Admissions and Information contact:
Head Office: Pinnacle Skills, WestCity building, DC court junction, Duncan Basti, 
Dimapur, Nagaland

Contact Nos: 7005745012 / 7005542344
Website: www.pinnacleskills.in
Facebook: @PinnacleSkillsIndia
Instagram: @PinnacleSkills

snippet.title: Jhoom | Episode 1 - Be Right Back | Marathi Webseries | @Bira 91 Merch Store  #bhadipa #bira91boom
snippet.description:
(DISCLAIMER - No animals were harmed during the filming of this series.) Gaurav and Isha's sibling banter has grown with their age! As Gaurav plans a late-night outing, Isha is all set to participate with her suggestions and instructions. But what happens when the plan turns around and mom becomes the plot twist? Watch this episode to find out! 
Jhoom is our new webseries that takes you on a twisted journey of youth, fate, family, friends and chaos. Join along for this fun ride as we release a New Episode, every Sunday. Subscribe to #Bhadipa to get all the alerts.

en.title: Jhoom | Episode 1 - Be Right Back | Marathi Webseries | @Bira 91 Merch Store  #bhadipa #bira91boom
en.description:
(DISCLAIMER - No animals were harmed during the filming of this series.) Gaurav and Isha's sibling banter has grown with their age! As Gaurav plans a late-night outing, Isha is all set to participate with her suggestions and instructions. But what happens when the plan turns around and mom becomes the plot twist? Watch this episode to find out! 
Jhoom is our new webseries that takes you on a twisted journey of youth, fate, family, friends and chaos. Join along for this fun ride as we release a New Episode, every Sunday. Subscribe to #Bhadipa to get all the alerts.

mr.title: झूम | एपिसोड १ - शून्य मिनीटांत आलो | वेब सिरीज | #bhadipa #bira91boom
mr.description:
त्यांच्या वयासारखीच, गौरव आणि इशाची भांडणं सुद्धा वाढली आहेत! गौरव ने केला आहे रात्री उशिराचा बेत पण ईशा तिच्या सूचनांनी करत आहे त्याला लेट. काय होणार जेव्हा आईला कळणार त्यांचे उपद्व्याप? जाणून घेण्यासाठी हा भाग शेवटपर्यंत पाहा.
झूम ही आमची एक नवीन वेब सिरीज आहे. मित्र, कुटुंब, आणि गडबड-गोंधळ ह्या सर्वांनी भरपूर असा हा अनुभव नक्की घ्या. घेऊन येत आहोत एक नवीन भाग  प्रत्येक रविवारी. म्हणूनच #भाडिपा ला सबस्क्राईब करा. 

श्रेयावली

कलाकार
आई - विभावरी देशपांडे
बाबा - सुनील अभ्यंकर
छोटा गौरव - अर्णव कल्कुंद्रे
छोटी ईशा - अर्वी मुरकुटे
गौरव - गंधर्व गुळवेलकर
ईशा - तृष्णा चंद्रात्रे
रेवा - कृतिका देव

दिग्दर्शन - ओमकार जाधव, अभय राऊत
निर्माते - सारंग साठये,पॉला मॅकग्लेन, अनुषा नंदकुमार
नाटक आणि कथा - वरुण नार्वेकर
पटकथा - सई हवल, प्राची हंकारे
संवाद - वरुण नार्वेकर, सई हवल, प्राची हंकारे
एक्झिक्युटिव्ह प्रोड्युसर - प्राजक्ता सालबर्डे
छायाचित्रण संचालक - चैतन्य पुराणिक
संकलन - अनुजा भंडारे
साऊंड डिझाईन, सिंक साऊंड आणि मिक्स - सौरभ मोरगावकर, समीर तंबोली
रंगभूषा आणि वेशभूषा - आशिष हेमंत देशपांडे
संगीत दिग्दर्शन - ए. व्ही. प्रफुल्लाचंद्र
कला दिग्दर्शन - मयूर पवार, अक्षय आंबेडकर
कलरिस्ट: कुणाल तिवारी
ब्रँड आणि सेल्स हेड - स्वानंद तेंडुलकर
पहिला सहाय्यक दिग्दर्शक - राजीब रावल
सहाय्यक दिग्दर्शक - अभिप्राय कामठे, पृथ्वीराज चव्हाण
लाईन प्रोड्युसर - तेजस लिमये
प्रोडक्शन असिस्टंट - रोहन खरे
पहिला एसी आणि फोकस पुलर - बडे कृष्णा
कास्टिंग - ओमकार जाधव, अभय राऊत
लोगो डिझाईन टायटल ऍनिमेशन आणि वी.एफ.एक्स. - इंविमोल्ड पिक्चर्स
वेशभूषा सहाय्यक - हर्षदा आंबेडकर
रंगभूषा सहाय्यक - उमेश जाधव
क्रिएटिव्हस् - प्राजक्ता नेवाळकर
फायनान्स आणि अकाऊंटस्- आदित्य देसाई
बी. टी. एस. - ओमकार कुडाळे
टीम सॅनीटायझेशन - पार्थसारथी वडगावकर
वी.एफ.एक्स. टीम - प्रतीक उमाळे, जयराज वारती
स्पॉट - संतोष मांपेडी, प्रवीण तरी
केटरिंग - हॉटेल ग्रीन सिग्नल, पुणे
लोकेशन - शिवनगरी सोसायटी
लोकेशन करटसी - पराग आणि सुप्रिया वडगावकर
उपशीर्षक - प्राची हंकरे
ट्रान्सपोर्ट - सागर राऊत, स्वप्नील भोसले
कॅमेरा वेंडर - अकॉर्ड एक्विप, पुणे
कॅमेरा अटेंडेंट - नागेश शिंदे, जितेंद्र सिंग
 लाईट वेंडर - आयडीयल सिने इक्विपमेंट्स
लायटिंग टीम - बंटी साळुंखे, पप्पू साळुंखे, महादेव शिंदे, योगेश वानरे, दीपक राजपूत
प्रॉप मॅन - नितीन आर्ट्स, उमेश मुळे
ग्राफिक डिझाइन - व्हिजन ग्राफिक्स
कला टीम - रशमिकांत सलावी, अंकुश मालेकर, महेश कुऱ्हाडे, सचिन चासकर, अमोल कानडे, राजकुमार शर्मा, रामहारक विश्वकर्मा
सोशल मीडिया टीम - अनिकेत जाधव, पूजा परब, तन्वी कुलकर्णी, रिचा जावळेकर

snippet.title: क्यूँ पीना चाहता है Jethalal ? | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | Mini Episodes | Webisodes
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to SAB TV Channel: https://www.youtube.com/user/sabtv?sub_confirmation=1

Click to watch all the mini-episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7YXlq18P_6laPNbm0MuqEuG

About The Show:
----------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

In a bid to save an 8-year-old girl from becoming the victim of Sati, Anirudh marries a curious and tyrant girl Bondita. At a time when women education was considered sinful, Anirudh educates Bondita and makes her the first “Barrister Babu” of their region. Will their imperfect marriage turn into a successful relationship? Will Anirudh succeed in his mission to gain independence for the women in his country?

'Swaragini' is a story about Swara and Ragini, who belong to warring families, but later realise that they are in fact half-sisters. Out of sheer hatred, Ragini manipulates Swara's love interest, Lakshaya into marriage, while Swara ends up getting married to Lakshya's brother, Sanskar. Once he learns the truth, Sanskar swears to reunite Swara with Lakshya, but in turn falls in love with her. Will Swara choose her lover over her husband, or will the sanctity of holy matrimony triumph?

snippet.title: Stylish Star Allu Arjun Speech At Introducing Pushpa Raj - The First Meet Event | Sukumar | DSP
snippet.description:
Introducing Pushpa Raj - The First meet on Mythri Movie Makers. written and directed by Sukumar. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y. Ravi Shankar of Mythri Movie Makers in association with Muttamsetty Media, the film stars Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil and Rashmika Mandanna while Jagapathi Babu, Prakash Raj, Dhananjay, and Sunil play supporting roles.

The film's music is composed by Devi Sri Prasad, with cinematography and editing were performed by Miroslaw Kuba Brozek and Karthika Srinivas respectively. The film is scheduled to release on 13 August 2021, in Telugu along with dubbed versions in Malayalam, Tamil, Hindi and Kannada languages.

#Pushpa​​ #PreludeOfPushparaj​ #IntroducingPushpaRaj​ #AlluArjun​​ #Rashmika​​ #Faasil​ #Sukumar​​ #DSP​ #MythriMovieMakers​​

Produced by Naveen Yerneni, Y. Ravi Shankar

Music by Devi Sri Prasad
Cinematography: Miroslaw Kuba Brozek
Edited by Karthika Srinivas

snippet.title: Nayantara - Full Episode | 09 April 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Nayantara" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Nayantara: After 10 years of marriage, Adidev (Gourab Mondal) and Averi (Payal De) are about to experience parenthood with the birth of their first child. The doctor warns Avery that she might face life threatening complications if she decides to go ahead with the child birth. Averi does not tell Adidev about this because she wants to give him the happiness of fatherhood and be a mother herself. On the other hand, Avery means the world to Adidev, so he will definitely chose her life over the child. Avery gives birth to Tara (Hiya Mukherjee). Avery dies within a few minutes of Tara’s birth. The doctor informs Adidev that he had warned Avery but she did not listen. Adidev, who was already devastated by his wife's death, comes to know that the Income Tax Department had raided his office. Adidev starts to believe that Tara is the source of the misfortune in his life and hatred grows in his heart for Tara. On the other hand, Adidev's second wife Madhuja (Swarnakamal) loves Tara more than her own daughter Preeti. But Adideb can’t tolerate that either. Tara's only wish, will she ever get his father's affection?

snippet.title: Shakti | शक्ति | Episode 1216 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
When Soumya is at the temple praying to the all-powerful gods, she expresses her wish to meet her long-lost love, Harman. Tune in to the sneak peek of the forthcoming episode.
#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

snippet.title: NEW! Ep 3142 - Popatlal Aam Chor?! | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता का उल्टा चश्मा
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer
Munmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan Iyer
Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide
Sonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram Bhide
Nidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu) 
Gurucharan Singh/ Balwinder suri as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh Sodhi
Jennifer Mistry Bansiwal as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh Sodhi
Kavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi 
Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi
Kush Shah as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)
Shyam Pathak as Popatlal Pandey
Sharad Sankla as Abdul
Azhar Shaikh as Pinku 

Produced By: Neela Asit Modi, Asit Kumarr Modi 
Special Thanks: Mahesh Vakil, Indu Tarak Mehta
Set Design: Jayant Deshmukh

Costume Stylist: Ekta Brahmbhatt

Background Music: Sunil Patni

About Super Dancer 4 : 
---------------------------------------------------
Now in its fourth season, Super Dancer is a popular children's dance reality show. Spearheaded by Bollywood actress Shilpa Shetty, renowned choreographer Geeta Kapoor and Bollywood Director Anurag Basu, the show looks for 'Dance ka Kal'. After nationwide auditions, the judges select 12 children who are extraordinary dancers, aged between 4 to 13. These 12 dancers are paired with popular and able choreographers, the Super Gurus. Along with their Gurus, the kids compete to become Super Dancer - Dance Ka Kal.

snippet.title: Real Karnan History | Tamil | Madan Gowri | MG
snippet.description:
Join Special MG Squad: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCY6KjrDBN_tIRFT_QNqQbRQ/join
--------------
In this Madan Gowri video, we will be discussing a real incident behind Dhanush's Karnan movie. The Dhanush movie is supposedly a movie inspired by two incidents in the Tirunelveli district during the 1990s in the villages of Kodiankulam (Podiankulam in the movie) and Manjolai Estate workers. We will be exploring these two stories that happened in Tamil Nadu.

localized.title: Real Karnan History | Tamil | Madan Gowri | MG
localized.description:
Join Special MG Squad: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCY6KjrDBN_tIRFT_QNqQbRQ/join
--------------
In this Madan Gowri video, we will be discussing a real incident behind Dhanush's Karnan movie. The Dhanush movie is supposedly a movie inspired by two incidents in the Tirunelveli district during the 1990s in the villages of Kodiankulam (Podiankulam in the movie) and Manjolai Estate workers. We will be exploring these two stories that happened in Tamil Nadu.

snippet.title: Rehearsal Session - Rama Nama Tharakam - Vande Guru Paramparaam
snippet.description:
Part of 'Vande Guru Paramparaam' - A Spiritual Musical Series. 

Music - Composed, Produced, Directed, Recorded, Mixed, Mastered, Video Edited & Harmonium by Kuldeep M Pai
http://kuldeepmpai.com
http://www.youtube.com/kuldeepmpai
http://www.facebook.com/kuldeepmpai
http://www.twitter.com/kuldeepmpai

© & ℗ 2021: Kuldeep M Pai
Licensee: Chith Foundation
All rights reserved. 

'Vande Guru Paramparaam' - a spiritual musical series produced by Sri Kuldeep M Pai is a genuine attempt at infusing the abundance of our cultural heritage in the younger generations. What better agency than Music can there be to inspire the young and aged alike? A team of talented kids spearheaded by Sooryagayathri, Rahul Vellal, Bhavya Ganapathi, Raghuram Manikandan and Paavani Cotah have played their parts in transferring the Transcendental Truth through their dulcet voices. The musical videos in this series have already won acclaim from millions of viewers across the globe. It's now time for us to bow before the lineage of Gurus and relish the beatitude of divine buoyancy. Vande Guru Paramparaam! Vande Guru Paramparaam!

snippet.title: Baalveer Returns Season 2  - बालवीर रिटर्न्स सीज़न २ - Ep 340 - 12th April, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to watch the full episode of Baalveer Returns: 
https://www.sonyliv.com/dplnk?schema=sony://asset/1000114651#utm_source=YOUTUBE&utm_medium=slate&utm_campaign=YT_traffic

Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Episode 340:  Baal Pari's Locate Happy's Location
--------------------------------------------------------
Debu's Mother visits Happy's house to plan the weeding of her friends daughter. Meanwhile Ananya Pari is on a search of Baalveer's lookalike . Shakti Khoj yantra indicates the pari's that Baalveer is nearby. Meanwhile Debu's mother forgets her bag at happy's house and Happy is following her bus to return her the bag to know more watch the full episode.

 

More Useful Links :
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV

About Baalveer Returns:
---------------------------------------
After Pari-Lok, the home of benevolent fairies was destroyed by a mighty evil, Timnasa. Baalveer takes shelter in Veer-Lok along with a few Paris who had survived the massacre. There, under the guidance of the wise old white lion Shaurya, Baalveer and Pari's are instructed to find the successor of Baalveer at the earliest, since he was immensely injured during the war and will need to team up a new Baalveer to further fight the battle with evil. This search for the next Baalveer takes them to earth, where they discover Vivan, who lives in an old society of Mumbai. He is the naughtiest kid, an ardent fan of Salman Khan, and a non-believer of Baalveer and his powers. This adds to the misery of Baalveer because unfortunately, this undisciplined, non-believer kid is the real successor of Baalveer. What follows is the challenging journey of Baalveer and his team to make Vivaan the next Baalveer with some eccentric characters, childish games, and lots of magic on earth and the respective Loks, while the imminent threat of Timnasa and the mystery behind her origin continues to play a part.

Shakti Khoj yantra indicates the pari's that Baalveer is nearby. Meanwhile Debu's mother forgets her bag at happy's house and Happy is following her bus to return her the bag to know more watch the full episode.

 

More Useful Links :
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV

About Baalveer Returns:
---------------------------------------
After Pari-Lok, the home of benevolent fairies was destroyed by a mighty evil, Timnasa. Baalveer takes shelter in Veer-Lok along with a few Paris who had survived the massacre. There, under the guidance of the wise old white lion Shaurya, Baalveer and Pari's are instructed to find the successor of Baalveer at the earliest, since he was immensely injured during the war and will need to team up a new Baalveer to further fight the battle with evil. This search for the next Baalveer takes them to earth, where they discover Vivan, who lives in an old society of Mumbai. He is the naughtiest kid, an ardent fan of Salman Khan, and a non-believer of Baalveer and his powers. This adds to the misery of Baalveer because unfortunately, this undisciplined, non-believer kid is the real successor of Baalveer. What follows is the challenging journey of Baalveer and his team to make Vivaan the next Baalveer with some eccentric characters, childish games, and lots of magic on earth and the respective Loks, while the imminent threat of Timnasa and the mystery behind her origin continues to play a part.

snippet.title: Watch LIVE: ગુજરાતમાં લૉકડાઉન? CM વિજય રૂપાણી LIVE on ZEE 24 Kalak
snippet.description:
Watch LIVE: ગુજરાતમાં લૉકડાઉન? CM વિજય રૂપાણી LIVE on ZEE 24 Kalak

ગુજરાત હાઇકોર્ટ દ્વારા આજે રાજ્યમાં કોરોનાની સ્થિતિ અંગે સુનાવણી હાથ ધરવામાં આવી હતી. જેમાં હાઇકોર્ટ દ્વારા સરકારની વ્યવસ્થાઓ અંગે ખુબ જ ઝાટકણી કાઢવામાં આવી હતી. રોજનાં 27 હજારથી વધારે ઇન્જેક્શનનું નિર્માણ થઇ રહ્યું છે તો દોઢ બે કિલોમીટર લાંબી લાઇનો શા માટે લાગી રહી છે? સરકાર પર હવે નાગરિકોને ભરોસો નથી રહ્યો તેવી પણ હાઇકોર્ટ દ્વારા ટકોર કરવામાં આવી હતી. સરકાર તમામ વસ્તુઓ ઉપલબ્ધ હોવાનાં અને સબ સલામત હોવાનાં દાવા કરી રહી છે તો હોસ્પિટલો ફુલ શેનાથી થઇ રહી છે.

snippet.title: Choti Sarrdaarni | छोटी सरदारनी | Episode 450 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
Sarabjeet lashes out at Sandhya for interfering in the family matter rather than taking care of Seher, but Sandhya holds her ground. Tune in to the sneak peek of the forthcoming episode.
#ColorsTV #ChotiSarrdaarni

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Meher is coerced by her mother into marrying Sarabjeet, a widower with a 5 year-old child. But, much to her mother’s dislike, Meher is pregnant with her lover, Manav’s child. Can she stand up for her love and fight her own? This is the journey of a strong-willed woman who makes her own rules and stands by them, come what may. Naag se badh kar Naagin, Sher se badh kar Sherni aur Sardar se badh kar Choti Sarrdaarni! Watch the fiercely independent sardani take on the world and protect her family in Choti Sarrdaarni.

snippet.description:
➟  Download & Stream: https://mai.lnk.to/kaancheck 
#Kaancheck is a colloquial term / slang for a ‘slap’. #DEvil narrates the flaws and vices in our society through a police inspector’s perspective and how some citizens deserve a ‘Kaancheck’ for being a menace to others.

 -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Lyrics:
(Hook)
Kaan check, kaan check, fatt fatt mein, kaan check 
Kaan check, kaan check, satt satt mein, kaan check 
Kaan check, kaan check, fatt fatt mein, satt satt mein  
Satt satt mein, fatt fatt mein, fatt fatt mein, kaancheck

Ek kaan check
Do kaan check
Teen kaan check
Char kaan check
Fatt fatt mein, fatt fatt mein
Jhatt jhatt mein, satt satt mein
Fatke hai, fatke hai, kaancheck

(Verse 1)
Apan taan ke kheeche
Poore bambai ki aawaj 
Tere kaan ke neeche
Seedha thobde pe land
Tapamaan bhi theek hai
Ek chapati mein chote tu jhul dega
Lefty se fatka du
Right se khaali hull dega
Raste pe mootega
Patte se footega
Baccho ko lootega 
Jhatke mein tootega
Thukega gutkha 
Banadunga butka
Kaan ke neeche garam karke sekunga bhutta
Jab padati hai chaapti
Public hai kaapti
Sunega dus baat bhi fir maarenge laat bhi
Jo neta karega ghotale
Poori public milke usko dho daale
Kone mein baith ke tu roota reh
Jabtak mai maaru nai tab tak tu soota reh
Ab tak tu sudhara nai
Kyuki mera laafa tere kaan ke neeche utara nai

(Hook)
Kaan check, kaan check, fatt fatt mein, kaan check 
Kaan check, kaan check, satt satt mein, kaan check 
Kaan check, kaan check, fatt fatt mein, satt satt mein  
Satt satt mein, fatt fatt mein, fatt fatt mein, kaancheck

Ek kaan check
Do kaan check
Teen kaan check
Char kaan check
Fatt fatt mein, fatt fatt mein
Jhatt jhatt mein, satt satt mein
Fatke hai, fatke hai, kaancheck

(Verse 2)
Mai fatka nai lagayega tu kaise aage jayega
Apna laafa khayega toh munafa hi paayega
Badhiri se tereko jagayega
Kaan ke neeche, daily mai sunaate hi jayega 
Samajh ke bahar ki baat hai na chote 
Tere magach ke bahar ki baat hai
Ye ghinoni soch wale log saale
Bohot saare, unko bhi noch daale
Khille ke maafik hum thok daale
Thobde se smile teri jhatke mein poch daale
Duniya mein jidhar bhi tu shaanpatti karega
Udhar aake mein tera kaanpatti bharega
Jo bhi karamchari scandal karega
Takle pe maushi ka sandal padega
Power dikhayega tu paise ka
Fir fatka khayega mere jaise ka

(Hook)
Kaan check, kaan check, fatt fatt mein, kaan check 
Kaan check, kaan check, satt satt mein, kaan check 
Kaan check, kaan check, fatt fatt mein, satt satt mein  
Satt satt mein, fatt fatt mein, fatt fatt mein, kaancheck

Ek kaan check
Do kaan check
Teen kaan check
Char kaan check
Fatt fatt mein, fatt fatt mein
Jhatt jhatt mein, satt satt mein
Fatke hai, fatke hai, kaancheck

(OUTRO)
Ky Bob Marley
Kon Bob Marley 
Aata me bagh kashi maarli
Chala chala chala
Chala!

snippet.title: Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 - Ep 10 Teaser - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 9th April 21
snippet.description:
Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 - Ep 10 Teaser - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 9th April 21

Your favourite Pakistani dramas are just a click away! Subscribe and hit the bell icon to never miss a video from our amazing YouTube channel that is now available in the USA https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Khuda Aur Mohabbat Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her family’s class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.
Though Mahi appreciates Farhad’s efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win Mahi’s heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-crossed souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?
Written by: Hashim Nadeem Khan

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her family’s class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.
Though Mahi appreciates Farhad’s efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win Mahi’s heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-crossed souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?
Written by: Hashim Nadeem Khan
Directed by: Syed Wajahat Hussain
Produced by: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment
Singer: Rahat Fateh Ali Khan & Nish Asher
Lyrics: Qamar Nashad
Composer: Naveed Nashad
